steps.name: Flight Precheck
steps.instructions: Create feature branch. Verify workspace is clean.

steps.name: Context Preflight
steps.instructions: Run rivet context --intent code and save the contract to context.json. Review workflow recommendations, deterministic knowledge, and completeness before writing code.
steps.evidence: Generated context.json with rivet context --intent code; collector found GitHub repo context and no solutions, expected for a fresh Python MCP repo.

steps.name: Verify Contract
steps.instructions: Write MUST PASS, MUST FAIL, and Integration Points. Save to contract.md.
steps.evidence: Authored contract.md with MUST PASS (9), MUST FAIL (9), Integration Points table, and explicit out-of-scope. Contract enforces 133/29 inventory parity, write-tool isolation, phased rollout, monolith retention, no source-repo writes.

steps.name: Spec/PRD
steps.instructions: Write specification and design document with measurable acceptance criteria. Save to spec.md and design.md.
steps.evidence: Authored spec.md (executive summary, current state with verified 133/29 numbers, 7 functional + 3 non-functional + 3 constraint requirements, 7 risks) and design.md (5-server split table summing to 133/29/104, console scripts, transport/security per server, 5 named acceptance gates G1-G5, 5-phase rollout with rollback, 7 risk mitigations, tool-inventory.json schema).

steps.name: Adversarial Spec
steps.instructions: Attack spec with AS-001..AS-008. Save findings to as-findings.json.
steps.evidence: AS-1..14 reviewed. 4 highs (AS-1/2/3/4) and 7 mediums + 3 lows mitigated by spec/design/contract edits: contract MUST-PASS #2 strengthened to set-equality; spec C2 allows re-pin via inventory-history.json; spec out-of-scope adds source-repo CI as separate post-merge PR; design G4 control row redefined as request-shape parity (no live mutation); design auth softened (static bearer from K8s Secret, rotation policy declared in Phase 4); design 7.1 phase-status.json append-only tracker + Phase 5 entry-criterion script + OpenWebUI grep gate; design 7.2 OpenWebUI overlap test as Phase 1 first deliverable; design 7.3 Phase 3 locked core version; design RK-7 notes gitleaks upgrade in Phase 1; design 9 strict mode for unrecognised decorators; design 9.1 validate_inventory.py as Phase 0 Step 7 real gate; design 9.2 hidden-mutation scan deferred to Phase 1; Q4/Q5/Q6 added to design 11. Zero criticals; verdict PROCEED with edits respected.

steps.name: Implement
steps.instructions: HUMAN REVIEW GATE: Review the spec, contract, and adversarial findings before proceeding. Run 'rivet sdd step --approve' to begin implementation.
steps.evidence: Phase 0 deliverables created: docs/migration/migration-plan.md, docs/migration/tool-inventory.json (51/30/7/16/29=133, 29 writes), docs/migration/phase-status.json + inventory-history.json (append-only seeds), tools/validate_inventory.py. Validator green: 133/29/104. Contract updated with MP-1..9 / MF-1..9 IDs.

steps.name: Doc Scaffolding
steps.instructions: Update or scaffold documentation for the configured target(s). Uncommitted .md changes on the mapped target path are required.
steps.evidence: Public migration-plan.md scaffolded at docs/migration/migration-plan.md (uncommitted, .md file change present in working tree).; Auto-scaffolded 1 doc file(s)

steps.name: Build + Test
steps.instructions: Run build and tests. Save results to build-result.json.
steps.evidence: build-result.json: validator exit 0 (133/29/104), source-repo pytest 102 passed baseline. No build to run (docs+JSON+script only).

steps.name: Grade Contract
steps.instructions: Grade each MUST PASS/FAIL item. Save to contract-grade.json.
steps.evidence: Graded MP-1..9 (8 PASS, 1 PENDING for verify) and MF-1..9 (all rejections proven).

steps.name: Adversarial Verify
steps.instructions: CLI runs rivet verify --scope branch automatically. Triple adversarial required.
